danger.label: Unfavorable
danger.description: The stars are in opposition. Forces of chaos disrupt the integration of incantations — many MR scrolls are rejected, corrupted or lost in the void. Only urgent ritual intervention can reverse this dark omen.

warning.label: Mediocre
warning.description: The constellations are unstable. Some incantations manage to reach the Main Scroll, but cosmic turbulence slows their passage. Proceed with caution and purify each spell before submission.

info.label: Favorable
info.description: The celestial alignments suggest a favorable period for integration. Most incantations are successfully merging into the Main Scroll, though three dark stars loom in the warnings below.

success.label: Optimal
success.description: The stars align perfectly. The flow of incantations streams remarkably smoothly into the Main Scroll. The time for great merges is upon us — the code guardians are in harmony and the omens could not be more auspicious.

warningItem.abandoned: Has been drifting in the void for {{moons}} moon(s) without review
warningItem.unsanctified: Contains previously unpublished incantations without a master approval
warningItem.chaos: Has grown too large (+{{count}} lines) for safe integration

highCouncil.title: The High Council
highCouncil.subtitle: The mystical guardians who safeguard the sacred architecture.

gitlab.title: GitLab Connection
gitlab.subtitle: Enter your credentials to summon data from your project.
